title: Apparatus for peritoneal ultrafiltration
abstract: An apparatus for ultrafiltration of a patient, comprising a patient tube (22) for access to a peritoneal cavity of the patient; a flow pump (41, 43); a glucose bag (26), comprising concentrated glucose solution; a glucose pump (16) for addition of concentrated glucose to said fluid. The flow pump comprises a pump chamber having rigid walls and a flexible pump bag being inserted in the pump chamber, whereby the exterior of the flexible pump bag is exposed to a positive or negative pressure inside said pump chamber. The pump chamber is provided with a lid (62) at one end and a cap (61) at the other end, which both are removable. The pump chamber comprises an overpressure when the lid (or cap) is going to be removed and/or a sub pressure when the lid (or cap) is going to be inserted.
claims: Claims 1. An apparatus for ultrafiltration of a patient in need thereof, for example a patient which is overhydrated, comprising a patient tube (22) for access to a peritoneal cavity of the patient; a flow pump for removal of a fluid via said patient tube from the peritoneal cavity and to a flexible pump bag (64) and for filling of the fluid from the pump bag (64) to the peritoneal cavity; a glucose bag connector (26) for connection to a glucose bag comprising concentrated glucose solution; a glucose pump (16) for addition of concentrated glucose to said fluid; whereby the glucose is diluted in said fluid and replenished intermittently for keeping a concentration of the osmotic agent substantially constant in the peritoneal cavity, whereby said flow pump comprises a pneumatic pump chamber (43) having rigid walls and said flexible pump bag (64) is constructed to be inserted in said pump chamber, whereby the exterior of the flexible pump bag (64) is exposed to a positive or negative pressure inside said pump chamber (43) by means of an air pump generating a positive pressure or a negative pressure inside said pneumatic pump chamber; characterized in that said pneumatic pump chamber (43) comprises a cylindrical tube with a first open end and a second open end at opposite sides of said cylindrical tube; an end cap (61) arranged at said first open end of said pump chamber, said end cap being removable and being sealed to the cylindrical tube by a first radial sealing member (95); a lid (62), which is constructed to be inserted at the second open end of said pump chamber, said lid being sealed to the cylindrical tube by a second radial sealing member (95); a flow tube (42) for connection of said flexible pump bag (64) to said patient tube (22), whereby said flow tube (42) extends through said lid (62) so that the flow tube (42) is arranged outside the cylindrical tube (43) and the flexible pump bag (64) is arranged inside said cylindrical tube (43) when the lid is inserted at the second open end of said pump chamber. 2. The apparatus according to claim 1, wherein said sealing member is arranged the open end of said cylindrical tube and is constructed for cooperation with a mating cylindrical surface of said end cap (61) or said lid (62). 3. The apparatus according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the pump chamber (43) comprises an overpressure when the lid (62) and/or the cap (61) is to be removed for overcoming friction forces of the radial sealing member (95). 4. The apparatus according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the pump chamber (43) comprises a sub pressure when the lid (62) and/or the cap (61) is to be inserted for overcoming friction forces of the radial sealing member (95). 5. The apparatus according to any one of the previous claims, wherein said flexible pump bag (64) is provided with a reinforcement member (66, 67) extending from the lid (62) to the other end of the pump chamber (43) for enabling insertion of the flexible bag in the cylindrical tube. 6. The apparatus according to claim 5, wherein said reinforcement member is a longitudinal thickening of the material of the flexible pump bag. 7. The apparatus according to claim 5, wherein said reinforcement member is longitudinal pocket which may be inflated by a fluid pressure, such as an air pressure. 8. The apparatus according to claim 5, wherein said reinforcement member is an elongation (67) of a tube through the flexible pump bag lid, said tube being provided with several holes (68), which open to the interior of the flexible pump bag. 9. The apparatus according to any one of the previous claims, further comprising at least one magnet and at least one magnet detector, such as a reed relay, for indicating that the lid (62) is arranged in a locked position.
